info.title: Fulfillment - bg.logistics.shipment.create
info.description: The bg.logistics.shipment.create interface is for sellers to place online logistics orders and receive package numbers, which enables to effortlessly place logistics orders with selected carriers online.

post.summary: The bg.logistics.shipment.create interface is for sellers to place online logistics orders and receive package numbers, which enables to effortlessly place logistics orders with selected carriers online.
post.description: The bg.logistics.shipment.create interface is for sellers to place online logistics orders and receive package numbers, which enables to effortlessly place logistics orders with selected carriers online.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `bg.logistics.shipment.create`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: sendType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: SendType 0:All the products in one parent order are shipped in one package with one tracking number 1:Partical products in one parent order are shipped in multiple packages with multiple tracking numbers and all the products in one order should be shipped in one API call. 2:All the products in multiple parent orders are shipped in one package with one tracking number.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: shipLater
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Ship Later TRUE: apply to create the package apply to create the tracking numbers from Temu-integrated carriers online. Mark this package as "ship later". FALSE: apply to create the package. apply to create the tracking numbers from Temu-integrated carriers online. apply to ship the package with these tracking numbers and mark this package as shipped.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: shipLaterLimitTime
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The deadline for later shipment, with options being: 24, 48, 72, 96,120 hours.

rows.Error Message: Orders with "signature_required_on_delivery" can only buy shipping label from the channel which provide signature service,please call "bg.logistics.shippingservices.get" to get the recommended channels.

The Order with label "signature_required_on_delivery" and other orders cannot be fulfilled at the same time. Please fulfill the order with label "signature_required_on_delivery" separately.

COD orders cannot be combined with PPD orders for shipping in one package.

You should choose one fulfillment way and fulfill channelId or shipLogisticsType.

Failed to buy the shipping label. Please fill in the warehouse management type and warehouse brand in the Temu seller center first.
The order with "US-to-CA" Label and the order without "US-to-CA" Label can't be shipped together.
Missing required parameters for 'sendSubRequestList'.

Not support local mall

The parameter Weight should be integer.
The parameter warehouseId is invalid.

The request area is incorrect. Please check the request area and replace it with the correct request area. The request area for the United States is US, and the request area for other non-European countries is global.
The parentOrder or Order is invalid. Please check if the parentOrder matches the Order, the parentOrder or Order is nonexistent etc.
O-orders of COD type exist in body, and COD type O-orders can only be shipped with Temu Label.

rows.Error SOP: Please request "bg.logistics.shipment.result.get" to ensure whether the fulfillment request is successful.

x-temu-examples.content:
curl -X POST \
'https://openapi-b-global.temu.com/openapi/router' \
 -H 'content-type: application/json' \
 -d '{
  "access_token" : "test",
  "sendRequestList" : [ {
    "invoiceAccessKey" : "test",
    "extendWeightUnit" : "test",
    "pickupStartTime" : 1,
    "splitSubPackage" : true,
    "extendWeight" : "test",
    "pickupEndTime" : 1,
    "length" : "test",
    "dimensionUnit" : "test",
    "weight" : "test",
    "interlineShipCompanyList" : [ {
      "shipLogisticsType" : "test",
      "shipStageType" : "test",
      "shipCompanyId" : 1,
      "channelId" : 1
    } ],
    "shipCompanyId" : 1,
    "confirmAcceptance" : [ "test", "test" ],
    "warehouseId" : "test",
    "orderSendInfoList" : [ {
      "quantity" : 1,
      "orderSn" : "test",
      "parentOrderSn" : "test",
      "goodsId" : 1,
      "skuId" : 1
    } ],
    "width" : "test",
    "shipLogisticsType" : "test",
    "signServiceId" : 1,
    "sendSubRequestList" : [ {
      "invoiceAccessKey" : "test",
      "extendWeightUnit" : "test",
      "pickupStartTime" : 1,
      "extendWeight" : "test",
      "pickupEndTime" : 1,
      "length" : "test",
      "dimensionUnit" : "test",
      "weight" : "test",
      "interlineShipCompanyList" : [ {
        "shipLogisticsType" : "test",
        "shipStageType" : "test",
        "shipCompanyId" : 1,
        "channelId" : 1
      } ],
      "shipCompanyId" : 1,
      "confirmAcceptance" : [ "test", "test" ],
      "warehouseId" : "test",
      "width" : "test",
      "shipLogisticsType" : "test",
      "signServiceId" : 1,
      "channelId" : 1,
      "weightUnit" : "test",
      "height" : "test"
    } ],
    "autoConfirmAfterPickup" : true,
    "channelId" : 1,
    "weightUnit" : "test",
    "height" : "test"
  } ],
  "shipLater" : true,
  "app_key" : "test",
  "sign" : "test",
  "data_type" : "test",
  "sendType" : 1,
  "shipLaterLimitTime" : "test",
  "type" : "test",
  "version" : "test",
  "timestamp" : "test"
}'

type.description: API name,eg:bg.* Must be `bg.logistics.shipment.create` for this operation.

access_token.description: A secure token for access control.

timestamp.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

data_type.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

version.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

sendType.description: SendType 0:All the products in one parent order are shipped in one package with one tracking number 1:Partical products in one parent order are shipped in multiple packages with multiple tracking numbers and all the products in one order should be shipped in one API call. 2:All the products in multiple parent orders are shipped in one package with one tracking number.

shipLater.description: Ship Later TRUE: apply to create the package apply to create the tracking numbers from Temu-integrated carriers online. Mark this package as "ship later". FALSE: apply to create the package. apply to create the tracking numbers from Temu-integrated carriers online. apply to ship the package with these tracking numbers and mark this package as shipped.

shipLaterLimitTime.description: The deadline for later shipment, with options being: 24, 48, 72, 96,120 hours.
